title: Multi-node Renode mesh test harness
description: Scripts to spin up N Renode instances (T-Echo, RAK, mixed), each connected to lichen-sim, verify mesh formation and message routing. Should integrate with existing Python test infrastructure. Validates multi-hop before hardware.
close_reason: Multi-node harness with run_multi_node.py and test_mesh.py, supports T-Echo/RAK4631 mixed topologies
